steps.title: Count doubling periods
steps.content:
From $1704$ to $1944$ is
$$1944-1704=240$$
years. Since the population doubled every $60$ years, the number of doubling periods is
$$240\div60=4$$

steps.title: Work backward
steps.content: The $1944$ population is after $4$ doublings, so it is $2^4=16$ times the $1704$ population.

steps.title: Find the original population
steps.content:
Divide the $1944$ population by $16$:
$$192{,}000\div16=12{,}000$$
The answer is 12000.
